en: Act like we're working. Got any fucking stock for us?
ko: 일하는 척 해. 우리한테 주식 좀 있어?

en: Okay, wait, wait. He's coming. He's coming. Make some shit up.
ko: 알겠어, 잠깐만. 그가 오고 있어. 뭔가 만들어내.

en: Okay, so I think it was short Pfizer.
ko: 음, 나는 화이자를 공매도 했던 것 같아.

en: $430,000 in one month, Geordi? Huh?
$430,000 fucking dollars in one fucking month.
Good morning. They're business expenses. We're live.
ko: 좋은 아침. 이건 사업 비용이야. 생방송 중이야.

en: Business expenses? Geordi, look what you got here. What?
Look at this. $26,000 for one fucking dinner.
Okay, no, no, no. This could be explained.
ko: 아니, 아니, 이건 설명할 수 있어.

en: Dad, we had clients. We had the Pfizer clients.
ko: 아빠, 우리는 고객이 있었어. 화이자 고객이었어.

en: Right, the porterhouse from Argentina.
The expensive champagne and the wine. We had to buy champagne.
ko: 비싼 샴페인과 와인도 있었어. 샴페인을 사야 했어.

en: And you ordered all the fucking sides. Tell them about the sides. I ordered the sides.
ko: 그리고 너는 모든 사이드를 주문했어. 사이드에 대해 말해줘. 내가 사이드를 주문했어.

en: Sides? Sides? $26,000 worth of sides?
What are these sides? They cure cancer?
The sides did cure cancer. That's the problem.
ko: 그 사이드가 암을 치료했어. 그게 문제야.

en: That's why they were expensive.
Shut the fuck up. Stop.
EJ Entertainment. What the fuck is EJ Entertainment?
Well, that's, uh...
Yeah, Geordi, what's EJ Entertainment? Geordi, what is that?
ko: 그래, 조디, EJ 엔터테인먼트가 뭐야? 조디, 그게 뭐야?

en: It's a fucking prostitution ring.
